title: Is it really Yuis soul inside Unit 01
display_title: Is it really Yuis soul inside Unit 01
wikitext:
[]: Is it really Yui's soul inside Unit 01?             Quote Post by Hiromakuta » Sat Sep 10, 2005 9:29 am I've chatted with a friend of mine while ago, and he said that there isnÂ´t no evidence that Yui's soul is inside Unit 01, and he makes a good point. Sure one might say that Yui was "absorbed" by that Unit, but how is it possible to know that Shinji piloted the same Unit that swallowed her mother?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Sep 10, 2005 9:49 am Your friend is an idiot. Shinji sees his mother in Unit-01 in #16, Gendo directly addresses Unit-01 as "Yui" in #24', and Shinji addresses Unit-01 as "mother" in #25. Also, has he seen EoE? That anyone can watch that movie without figuring out that Yui is in Unit-01 and floats off into deep space at the end defies belief.

[]:             Quote Post by sir_evangelist » Sat Sep 10, 2005 9:58 am And donÂ´t forget the "accident" of yui when she entered evaÂ´s core, she was unificated inside eva01. Also, as Shin-seiki said, there a lot of moments where Shinji can hear his mother in eva. And in #20 we can clearly see that the soul in eva01 is yuiÂ´s one

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Sep 10, 2005 10:06 am This is pretty much one of the central points in the show. It's fairly hard to miss, although I did know someone who hadn't quite copped it the first time through. I even met someone who had guessed this fact as early as episode #02! Your friend is mistaken, or perhaps simply uncertain. Further viewings will make everything clear.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 10, 2005 1:08 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Your friend is an idiot.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Sep 10, 2005 1:32 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: Your friend is an idiot.

[]: Re: Is it really YuiÂ´s soul inside Unit 01?             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Sat Sep 10, 2005 1:49 pm Hiromakuta wrote: IÂ´ve chatted with a friend of mine while ago, and he said that there isnÂ´t no evidence that YuiÂ´s soul is inside Unit 01, and he makes a good point. Sure one might say that Yui was "absorbed" by that Unit, but how is it possible to know that Shinji piloted the same Unit that swallowed her mother?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Sep 10, 2005 2:01 pm or he's one of those types that won't accept anything about NGE as 'fact' unless it's spelled out specifically

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sat Sep 10, 2005 2:11 pm Defectron wrote: or he's one of those types that won't accept anything about NGE as 'fact' unless it's spelled out specifically

[]:             Quote Post by dr4g0nslr » Sat Sep 10, 2005 3:40 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Your friend is an idiot. Shinji sees his mother in Unit-01 in #16, Gendo directly addresses Unit-01 as "Yui" in #24', and Shinji addresses Unit-01 as "mother" in #25. Also, has he seen EoE? That anyone can watch that movie without figuring out that Yui is in Unit-01 and floats off into deep space at the end defies belief.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Sep 10, 2005 4:03 pm dr4g0nslr wrote: Please, no need for insults. :( Even if a person is wrong, we need to treat them with an ounce of respect or this would be an empty forum.

[]:             Quote Post by dr4g0nslr » Sat Sep 10, 2005 5:20 pm Yes it is silly to think Yui is not the sole of Eva unit one, but still as a matter of principle, it is not right to insult some one in that way. Please remember that part of building a good forum that will grow is to not act as if we are still in training pants. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sat Sep 10, 2005 6:55 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I even met someone who had guessed this fact as early as episode #02!

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat Sep 10, 2005 7:37 pm dr4g0nslr wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: Your friend is an idiot. Shinji sees his mother in Unit-01 in #16, Gendo directly addresses Unit-01 as "Yui" in #24', and Shinji addresses Unit-01 as "mother" in #25. Also, has he seen EoE? That anyone can watch that movie without figuring out that Yui is in Unit-01 and floats off into deep space at the end defies belief.

[]:             Quote Post by dr4g0nslr » Sat Sep 10, 2005 7:59 pm Would you then sir not take the time to correct a lost man on the street saying he going a place he faces away from? That is very rude like every one here it seems! You kindly mention to the man his distination is the othe way! Not call him a bloody fool! Arseholes all around it seems !

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sat Sep 10, 2005 8:01 pm dr4g0nslr wrote: Would you then sir not take the time to correct a lost man on the street saying he going a place he faces away from? That is very rude like every one here it seems! You kindly mention to the man his distination is the othe way! Not call him a bloody fool! Arseholes all around it seems !

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Sep 10, 2005 8:41 pm Space Penis wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I even met someone who had guessed this fact as early as episode #02!

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Sun Sep 11, 2005 12:47 am Yeah, the comment is on Eva Commentary page and refers to when Eva-01 blocks the falling debris by putting her hand over Shinji. Reichu's friend determined Eva-01's maternal nature right there, while another friend failed to figure this out even after finishing NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Sep 11, 2005 1:01 am Well I'm not sure when I figured it out that it was Shinjis mother, it was sometime during the latter half of the series

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Sep 11, 2005 7:52 am I read somewhere that yui is in unit 1, so i figured if its the souls? of the mothers of the children, then Asuka's mom was in unit 2. TS opened that door for me...
